titleStmt.title: SII 26.531: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 531. (A.R. No. 503 of 1909.) PUDUPĀḶAIYAM, SRIVILLIPUTTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the Paraṉṉaṅgāttaruḷiyasvāmin temple.

p.hi: Śrīvalladēva ( = Jaṭā Śrivallabha): Year 6, Mēsha (Chittirai) śu. 11, Friday, Uttiraṭṭādi = 1297 A.D., April 19. The tithi was ba. 11.

summary.p: This inscription is very much damaged.

It, however, appears to record a gift of a nandā lamp in the temple of the god (name lost) at Karuṅguḷam alias Śātavāśakanallūr in Veṇbaikkuḍi-nāḍu The gift is stated to have been received by several Śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple who had agreed to carry out the object for ever, failing which, they had agreed to burn two nandā lamps, besides paying a fine.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śrīvallatevaṟku yāṇṭu 6vatu meṣanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu Ekādaśiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttiraṭṭāti nāḷ vaṭavellait tirukkai I veṇpaikkuṭināṭṭuk karuṅkuḷamāṉa cātavācakanallūr Uṭai mu
koyil muppatu vaṭṭattil civabrāhmaṇaril tevapperumāḷāṉa kā yaṉum tampi śrī cātavācakapaṭṭaṉum Āṇṭāṉ Āḷkoṇṭa ṭakoṇṭanāyakapaṭṭaṉum cokkaṉ tirukalaivaṇṇa cokkapaṭṭaṉum yāṉ parameśvara- paṭṭaṉum Ivaṉaivom piṭipāṭu kallil veṭṭi kuṭuttapaṭiyā
ṉāṟku Iṭuvatāka tirunantāviḷakku Oṉṟukku muppatukku māta moṉṟukku Oṉṟaraikkum Innāḷ mutal cantirātittavarai viḷakkoṉṟum Erittu potuvemākavum Ittirunaṉtā viḷakku pū paṭi ṉṟaku Iraṇṭu tirunantā viḷakku merintu taṇṭam Oru paṇamum(ṅ) kuṭuppomākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu piṭipāṭu ka
l veṭṭik kuṭuttom periyāṟku Ivvaṉaivomum Ivai Eḻuttu Ivai cātavācaka paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Āriya toṇṭanāyakapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai co Ivai Inta taṉmaraṣippāṟku varkaḷ caraṇaṅkaḷiraṇṭum Eṉtalai meleṉa §
Digital edition of SII 26.531 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
